# MikuMikuLibrary dependency

`MikuMikuLibrary.dll` is built from commit `82380f1` of
<https://github.com/blueskythlikesclouds/MikuMikuLibrary>.

The managed library was retargeted to .NET 6 and is used only to read and
write MEGA39+ FARC, SpriteSet, and SpriteDatabase structures. Texture codecs
are provided by the managed `BCnEncoder.Net` package; no MikuMikuLibrary
native binary is shipped.

Build SHA-256:

`907CF22D416189739B3ECBFC37E73E6AAE8AE9D761DB5D895619839EB1036647`
